pi_items.source: User-defined workflow name to be created by agent
iDempiere official documentation: Project (Window ID-130) confirms table name is C_Project
User-defined workflow node names to be created by agent
User-defined start node configuration to be set by agent

privileged_info_summary: The C_Project table is the correct iDempiere core functionality table for project management (verified via iDempiere official documentation). iDempiere uses the C_ prefix for Common/Core tables and supports custom workflow creation with user-defined node names and sequential transitions. The verifier validates workflow creation through database queries of AD_Workflow, AD_WF_Node, and AD_WF_NodeNext tables, accepting case-insensitive node name matches.
